title: ononis serrata var. major
intro: Ononis serrata var. major, also known as the rough-leaved restharrow, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Ononis serrata var. major can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
